derived.causal_summary: Packet `009-post-save-render-fixes` repairs the nine systematic render-layer defects still visible in the 2026-04-09 `005-code-graph-upgrades` memory saves: filename-garbage titles, empty canonical sources, zeroed file counts, prose-bigram trigger noise, duplicated distinguishing evidence, stale phase and status capture, missing causal link auto-population, self-referential `parent_spec`, and the unresolved two-scorer naming conflict. The goal is to make fresh memory saves honestly satisfy the compact-wrapper contract defined by the sibling `001/.../006-research-memory-redundancy` packet without reopening the wrapper-template body or the Phase 6 sanitizer and duplication-review work that shipped in commit `7f0c0572a`.
